caption: A man with gray hair wearing a light blue button-down shirt stands behind a wooden lectern in a room with wood-paneled walls and blinds. He is addressing a small audience, including a person in a plaid shirt and others with gray hair, who are seen from the back. To the left of the speaker, a black speaker cabinet is visible. The lectern features a small red logo. The text "ORCA" is displayed in white letters on a blue background in the lower right corner of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak and gesture while the audience remains seated. In the final frame, a translucent overlay or motion blur effect obscures the image, making the people and the setting appear faint and ghostly.
